task_completion.description: Navigate to the customer management section in the Magento admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Magento admin panel with the 'Customers' or 'All Customers' grid visible.

task_completion.description: Filter the customer list to show only the 'Wholesale' customer group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The customer grid showing an active filter for the 'Wholesale' group, with the list updated to display only wholesale customers.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export of the filtered customer list as a CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Export' dropdown or button being used, with 'CSV' selected, or a browser download notification for a CSV file.

task_completion.description: Save or move the exported file to /home/ga/Documents/wholesale_leads.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing a file named 'wholesale_leads.csv' located inside the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV file contains the wholesale customer emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file opened in a spreadsheet viewer or text editor, clearly showing the emails: wholesale1@example.com, wholesale2@example.com, and wholesale3@example.com.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV file does NOT contain retail customer emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opened CSV file showing only the wholesale records, with no presence of retail1@example.com, retail2@example.com, or retail3@example.com.

integrity.description: The agent used the Magento web interface to perform the export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Magento admin panel in a web browser, rather than using terminal commands or database scripts to extract the data.

integrity.description: The CSV file appears to be a genuine Magento export rather than a manually created file.
integrity.visual_evidence: When the CSV is opened, it should contain standard Magento customer export headers and columns, not just a manually typed list of emails.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the customer emails into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of screenshots showing the agent manually typing the wholesale emails into a blank document or spreadsheet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be named exactly 'wholesale_leads.csv' and saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory. The exported CSV must contain exactly three wholesale customer emails: wholesale1@example.com, wholesale2@example.com, and wholesale3@example.com. It must strictly exclude the retail customer emails: retail1@example.com, retail2@example.com, and retail3@example.com.
